_comment: Source build manifest for clang-llvm-source-build. Pins SHA256 for all vendored source archives. LLVM parts are individually hashed plus the reassembled tarball is verified against the official upstream hash. Ninja has no official upstream checksum — hash is self-computed from the vendored tarball at time of pinning.

sha256._note: ninja-build does not publish official SHA256 checksums for release assets. This hash was self-computed from the vendored tarball at time of pinning (2026-03-17). Verify independently by re-downloading from the upstream release and comparing.

sources.name: Self-computed from vendored tarball (no official upstream checksum published)
